name: Non-Standard Port Usage
notes:
This rule detects non-standard port usage.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Typical Malware Back Connect Ports
SIGMA Description: Detects programs that connect to typical malware back connect ports based on statistical analysis from two different sandbox system databases


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches LOWER("Initiated") == 'true' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") NOT LIKE '%\program Files%' AND ( STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '10.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '192.168.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.16.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.17.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.18.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.19.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.20.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.21.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.22.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.23.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.24.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.25.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.26.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.27.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.28.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.29.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.30.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.31.%' AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '127.%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Non-Standard Port Usage on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches LOWER("Initiated") == 'true' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") NOT LIKE '%\program Files%' AND  (     STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '10.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '192.168.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.16.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.17.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.18.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.19.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.20.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.21.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.22.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.23.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.24.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.25.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.26.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.27.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.28.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.29.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.30.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '172.31.%'     AND STR("destinationaddress") NOT LIKE '127.%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects non-standard port usage.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
